content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "Works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (the only source file) is a plain local in-memory task list with no ad-blocking API, no ML/CoreML/AI framework import, and no offline-sync logic beyond trivial in-memory state.
Pierre: Apple's App Review flags metadata that promises features not present in the binary, per 2.3 and 2.3.1, and these three claims (ad blocking, AI suggestions, offline mode) are prominent but unsupported by any Swift code I can find — a simple `List`/`TextField`/`Button` app has none of this. Either implement the claimed features or rewrite the description to match what ContentView.swift actually does; otherwise expect a 2.3.1 rejection or removal risk.
